title: sterigmanthe splendens
intro: Sterigmanthe splendens, also known as Chinese chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sterigmanthe splendens include reducing fever, relieving headache and rheumatism, as well as promoting digestion and respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for use in traditional medicine, and it is also used in modern herbal preparations to support overall well-being.
